_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Dheh saaxiib, oo gal.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan waxaa loogu dhisay inuu furan yahay dhammaan luqadaha. Luqad kasta oo furan waxay leedahay hal abaal-marin tarjumad.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Liiska luqadaha iyo heerarka Marks waa ku meel-gaar ah. Marks waa calaamadaha ka qaybgalka, maaha hantida.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Ku turjum Liana Banyan {{language}}. Hel {{marks}} Marks marka la aqbalo.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ereyad kasta oo ku jira barnaamijkan waxaa loo magacaabay sabab. Asalka 26 magac ee ugu muhiimsan.
speakFriend.step1Body: Fur Abaal-marin Tarjumad ee Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Ku turjum xarfaha oo dhan ee loo baahan yahay. Soo gudbi iyada oo Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Marka la aqbalo, waad helaysaa Marks waxaana lagu diiwaangeliyaa IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Dheh saaxiib, oo gal."

languageSwitcher.tip: Isticmaal eraybixiyaha luqadaha kala duwan ee Albaabka Durin si aad u furto khibradaha gaar ah!
